prompt_text: Open source or affordable automation tools instead of n8n
response:
# Open Source & Affordable Automation Alternatives to n8n

## **Self-Hosted Open Source**

| Tool | Best For | Cost |
|------|----------|------|
| **Make (Integromat)** | Workflow automation, visual builder | Free tier, $9-299/mo |
| **Zapier** | Multi-app integrations | Free tier, $19-799/mo |
| **Apache Airflow** | Data pipelines, complex workflows | Free (self-hosted) |
| **Temporal** | Long-running workflows, microservices | Free (open source) |
| **Prefect** | Data orchestration | Free tier + paid |
| **Dagster** | Data orchestration, ML pipelines | Free + enterprise |
| **Luigi** | Python-based task automation | Free |
| **Mattermost Workflows** | Team automation | Free (open source) |

## **Lightweight & Budget-Friendly**

| Tool | Strengths |
|------|-----------|
| **IFTTT** | Simple if/then automation (free tier) |
| **Huginn** | Self-hosted agent automation |
| **Node-RED** | IoT & visual flow automation |
| **Automatisch** | n8n alternative, self-hosted |
| **Activepieces** | Modern, lightweight, self-hosted |
| **Windmill** | Open source internal tools + workflows |
| **Budibase** | Automation + low-code apps |

## **Code-Based (Developer-Friendly)**

- **Python**: APScheduler, Celery, schedule
- **Node.js**: node-cron, Bull queues
- **Go**: Temporal, Cadence
- **Bash**: Simple cron jobs + scripts

## **Specialized Use Cases**

- **Email/SMS**: Twilio (API) + custom scripts
- **Data pipelines**: dbt, Airflow, Prefect
- **Monitoring**: Prometheus + AlertManager
- **API orchestration**: Kong, tyk

## **My Recommendation**

- **Free/Solo**: Huginn or Activepieces (self-hosted)
- **Teams**: Make's free tier or Zapier starter
- **Complex workflows**: Apache Airflow or Temporal
- **Budget**: DIY with Python + APScheduler

**What's your automation need?** (data, APIs, scheduling, integrations?) I can suggest the best fit.
